tools.name: get_graph_status
tools.description: Get the status of the currently configured Amazon Neptune graph.

tools.name: get_graph_schema
tools.description:
Get the schema for the graph including the vertex and edge labels as well as the
    (vertex)-[edge]->(vertex) combinations.

tools.name: run_opencypher_query
tools.description: Executes the provided openCypher against the graph.

tools.name: run_gremlin_query
tools.description: Executes the provided Tinkerpop Gremlin against the graph.
